title: euphrasia officinalis var. stricta
intro: Euphrasia officinalis var. stricta, also known as the strict eyebright, is a subspecies of the Euphrasia officinalis plant, a type of flowering plant in the gentian family. This herb has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects that help to soothe and calm irritated eyes, skin, and mucous membranes. The health benefits of Euphrasia officinalis var. stricta include its ability to reduce swelling and alleviate symptoms of conjunctivitis, as well as its use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Euphrasia officinalis var. stricta can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or eye drop, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used in treating a range of health conditions.
